hero.title: The draw makes itself
hero.lead: Add the pairs, pick a format, and Ronda generates every match. Share one link and each player sees when they play, against whom, and on which court.
hero.note: Free for one active tournament. Your players never need an account.

draw.caption: A real 8-pair draw. Results come in and the bracket updates itself.

before.title: A WhatsApp group and a photo of the bracket

old.title: How it works today
old.body: Forty people in a group chat. A photo of a hand-drawn bracket that is already out of date. Three messages asking what time they play. And you, rubbing out and redrawing boxes between matches.

new.title: How it works with Ronda
new.body: One link. Every player opens it and sees their next match, the court and the time. You enter a result and the bracket, the standings and the schedule update for everyone at once.

one.title: Add the participants
one.body: Pairs, teams or individual players. Paste the list and Ronda sorts it out.

two.title: Pick the format
two.body: Ronda works out the pairings, places the seeds, distributes the byes and orders the rounds.

three.title: Share the link
three.body: Just one, for the whole tournament. No accounts, nothing to install.

formats.title: The draw, solved
formats.lead: All of it calculated, none of it guessed. Same tournament, same bracket, every time.

roundRobin.title: Round robin
roundRobin.body: Everyone plays everyone, once or twice. With an odd number of pairs the byes rotate on their own, so nobody sits out twice before everyone has sat out once.

knockout.title: Knockout
knockout.body: Seeds placed the way a bracket demands: 1 and 2 can only meet in the final. Byes go to the top seeds.

double.title: Double elimination
double.body: A winners bracket and a losers bracket. Nobody goes home after one defeat, which is the part that stings most in a one-day event.

groups.title: Groups into knockout
groups.body: Groups balanced by serpentine seeding, so no group of death. Group rivals cannot meet again in the first knockout round.

swiss.title: Swiss
swiss.body: Each round pairs players on similar scores and never repeats a matchup. Made for a big field and a short day.

courts.title: Courts and times
courts.body: Spreads matches across your courts without booking anyone twice, and without leaving a pair waiting all morning between two matches.

link.title: One link for the whole tournament
link.body: Your players create no account and install nothing. They open the link on their phone, on court, on club wifi, and see the bracket as it stands.

points.one: Opens on any phone, no app
points.two: Built to be read outdoors, at a glance
points.three: The same link lasts the whole season

free.title: Free
free.body: One active tournament, every format, public link and live results.

club.title: Club
club.body: Unlimited tournaments, your club's badge on the bracket, and PDF export to print and pin on the noticeboard.

footer.rights: Made in Spain for padel clubs.
